CVE-2025-44005.title: An attacker can bypass authorization checks and force a Step CA A ...
CVE-2025-44005.description: An attacker can bypass authorization checks and force a Step CA ACME or SCEP provisioner to create certificates without completing certain protocol authorization checks.

CVE-2025-66406.title: Step CA is an online certificate authority for secure, automated  ...
CVE-2025-66406.description: Step CA is an online certificate authority for secure, automated certificate management for DevOps. Prior to 0.29.0, there is an improper authorization check for SSH certificate revocation. This affects deployments configured with the SSHPOP provisioner. This vulnerability is fixed in 0.29.0.

CVE-2026-30836.title: Step CA is an online certificate authority for secure, automated  ...
CVE-2026-30836.description: Step CA is an online certificate authority for secure, automated certificate management for DevOps. Versions 0.30.0-rc6 and below do not safeguard against unauthenticated certificate issuance through the SCEP UpdateReq. This issue has been fixed in version 0.30.0.
